objective.current: Form provisional action-schema candidates from public action/effect traces, failed preconditions, residue, abduction and cost evidence.
objective.todo: Clarify the exact mechanism/state-transition: what inputs the layer accepts, what outputs it creates, and what must become true after execution.

includes.todo: List mandatory surfaces and subprocesses that must exist explicitly rather than being implied.

rationale.todo: Explain the architectural gap this layer closes and what fails without it.

excludes.todo: Define responsibility boundaries: what this layer must not do and which adjacent functions it must not silently replace.

notes.todo: Add working notes: caveats, blast radius, open questions, and implementation warnings.

claim_blocked_by.todo: List claim blockers and explicit conditions required to clear each blocker.

risk_tags.todo: Review shortcut, drift, and cascade risks; keep only real risk tags, not decorative labels.

functional_role.current: Forms provisional action-schema candidates from public AP01/effect traces, failures, residues, missing-precondition hypotheses, costs and abduction without one-shot skill maturity or adapter-provided macro-action claims.
functional_role.todo: Clarify the indispensable causal role of this phase and why it must exist as a separate layer.

why_exists.todo: Clarify the specific architecture problem this phase exists to solve.

inputs.todo: List exact input contracts and prerequisite references required by this phase.

outputs.todo: List exact outputs and invariants this phase must produce.

authority.todo: Clarify what the layer is allowed to assert/create and what is forbidden: action authority, fact closure, hidden truth, mature skill, etc.

forbidden_shortcuts.todo: List prohibited shortcut paths and invalid fallback substitutions.

uncertainty_policy.todo: Specify behavior under unknown/provisional/mixed/unresolved evidence states.

observables.todo: List observable signals that demonstrate correct operation.

failure_modes.todo: List primary failure modes and false-success signatures.

falsifiers.todo: List conditions under which this layer is considered architecturally invalid.

tests.todo: List mechanism tests, ablations, adversarial cases, and regression checks.

biological_analogy.todo: If relevant, specify biological/cognitive analogy and boundaries of applicability.

biological_support.todo: Document strength and source of biological/cognitive support.

evidence_strength.todo: Assess evidence strength and explain why that rating is justified.

provenance_note.todo: Record provenance of design assumptions (seam, experiment, audit, external source).

disciplines.todo: List disciplines grounding mechanism, constraints, and verification language.

alternative_models.todo: Add viable alternatives and explicit reasons for not adopting them.

evidence_ids.todo: Attach evidence record IDs that support or challenge this phase.
